entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the crop being studied for core collection augmentation

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger germplasm collection used to enhance utilization in crop improvement

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic resources of a crop used for breeding and improvement

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of crops for better yield or traits

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics Genebank where accessions were characterized

entities.name: NEWMAN-KEULS TEST
entities.description: A statistical test used to compare mean data between the core and entire collection

entities.name: LEVENE'S TEST
entities.description: A statistical test used to compare variance between the core and entire collection

entities.name: CHI-SQUARE TEST
entities.description: A statistical test used to compare distribution between the core and entire collection

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC CORRELATIONS
entities.description: Relationships between observable traits that may be linked to gene complexes

entities.name: COADAPTED GENE COMPLEXES
entities.description: Groups of genes that are inherited together and contribute to specific traits

entities.name: SHANNON-WEAVER DIVERSITY INDEX
entities.description: A measure used to evaluate the diversity of different traits in the collection

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist diseases

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease affecting pearl millet for which resistance sources are sought
